scenario_text: Add 25k devices (to total 50k) and initiate network scan; status latency at control level must not degrade >10% vs normal.
acceptance_criteria: 25k devices added; network scan initiated; status latency monitored

scenario_text: Efficient operations at scale; firmware update ≤ 3 min per device; bulk parallelization.
acceptance_criteria: Firmware updates completed within SLA; bulk operations executed successfully

scenario_text: Secure operating environment. Use SNMPv3, secure storage, RBAC; tenant isolation.
acceptance_criteria: Security controls implemented; tenant isolation verified

scenario_text: A deployment package is deployed to a new target platform (IEM, IED, Kubernetes, Cloud).
acceptance_criteria: The application automatically enables the appropriate platform-specific functionality using configuration and feature flags without requiring a new build.

scenario_text: A new client requires custom integrations and branding.
acceptance_criteria: Client-specific functionality is added with minimal impact to existing customers.

scenario_text: A deployment platform introduces stricter security controls requiring platform-specific libraries or hardening.
acceptance_criteria: Platform-specific packages can be produced while maintaining traceability and minimizing code divergence.
